title: Implement Rate Limiting for Book Purchases
statement:
Design an endpoint to process book purchases. Users can make multiple purchases within a short time frame, but after exceeding the maximum rate limit, the endpoint should return a 429 Too Many Requests error. Use the Fixed Window rate limiting strategy.

Implement the following endpoints:

* GET /api/purchase/limits: Returns the current rate limit data (remaining allowed requests, reset time)
* POST /api/purchase: Processes a book purchase

Visible test cases cover successful purchases and hitting the rate limit.

Hidden test cases cover edge cases, including missing headers, invalid JSON body, and authentication/rate limit limits.
constraints: Must use Fixed Window rate limiting strategy
Must use Express Rate Limit middleware

endpoints.description: Returns the current rate limit data (remaining allowed requests, reset time)
